name: Feed the Multitude
oracleText: Create three Food tokens. If you control a legendary creature, create two additional Food tokens and you gain 3 life.
flavorText: "And they did all eat, and were filled." — Matthew 14:20
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics were added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses Gustave Dore's "Christ Feeding the Multitude" via Wikimedia Commons.

classics.license: Public domain; Commons identifies the file as a faithful reproduction of a public-domain work.
classics.creditText: Gustave Dore, Christ Feeding the Multitude
classics.sourceNotes: Strong dramatic feeding scene for the card's miracle theme.
